selections.name: Viva Macaco
selections.reason: Excellent debut second over 5f at this track on Soft 6. Sure to improve and Chad Schofield retains the ride.

selections.name: Hy
selections.reason: Boxed on steadily for second on debut here. Drawn ideally in barrier 1 to get a soft run.

selections.name: Fawlty Affairs
selections.reason: Resumes from a spell. Trialled very well at Rosehill and has shown metropolitan-grade ability.

selections.name: Iambubb
selections.reason: Set the pace and fought on for third behind Viva Macaco last start. Fitter now.

danger_horse.name: Stronghold
danger_horse.reason: First starter by Harry Angel who won a recent trial at Rosehill in good style.

selections.name: Zunesha
selections.reason: Has put together consecutive second-place finishes on soft tracks. Ready to break through.

selections.name: Appin Opal
selections.reason: Solid third at Warwick Farm last start. Has the tactical speed to overcome the wide draw.

selections.name: Rebel Elegance
selections.reason: Resumes. Showed promise in her sole debut run at Warwick Farm and has trialled well.

selections.name: Miss Moulaga
selections.reason: Beaten just over 2 lengths on debut here on Soft 6. Expected to be much more prominent.

danger_horse.name: Magic Kaya
danger_horse.reason: Unexposed debutant by Maurice from the Joseph Pride yard who has trialled nicely.

selections.name: Che Ole (NZ)
selections.reason: Ultra-consistent filly who was a close third here last start. Drawn to get the gun run.

selections.name: Sirius Moss
selections.reason: In great form with consecutive placings at Gosford and Muswellbrook. Major threat.

selections.name: Orange Tsunami (NZ)
selections.reason: Fought on well for third at Wyong last start. Getting close to peak fitness now.

selections.name: Blazing Future
selections.reason: Fitter for one run back from a long spell. Best form is competitive here.

selections.name: My Shareena
selections.reason: Excellent second at Newcastle last start on heavy ground. Highly effective on soft tracks.

selections.name: Ruskana
selections.reason: Runner-up at this track and distance last start. Hard fit and handles the soft going.

selections.name: Airliner
selections.reason: Struggled in Highway class last start but previous second at Moruya was excellent.

selections.name: Wizard's Star
selections.reason: Solid third here last start over a mile. Gives the impression the 10f will suit.

danger_horse.name: Longinus
danger_horse.reason: Third-up today and has won at this stage of his preparation in the past.

selections.name: Ironblood Empress
selections.reason: Excellent fourth on debut at Randwick Kensington in Saturday class. Massive drop in grade.

selections.name: Cape Douglas
selections.reason: Fitter for two runs back. Beaten under 4 lengths here last start and Tyler Schiller rides.

selections.name: Share The Joy
selections.reason: First-up. Historically performs well when fresh and trialled nicely leading in.

selections.name: Warm Front
selections.reason: Resumes. Placed twice in his first preparation and gets the services of Alysha Collett.

danger_horse.name: Cosmora
danger_horse.reason: Raced in tougher maiden at Warwick Farm last start. Better suited back to provincial level.

selections.name: Castagnola
selections.reason: Fitter for one run back. Second-up record is excellent, including a win at Kensington.

selections.name: The Replicant (NZ)
selections.reason: Classy veteran dropping back to provincial grade. Capable of winning on his best form.

selections.name: Flying From Above
selections.reason: Good fourth here last start over 7f. Drawn perfectly to get a soft run on the speed.

selections.name: Silver Tempest
selections.reason: Disappointed last start but previous effort behind Dr Evil at this track was strong.

danger_horse.name: Girly Pop
danger_horse.reason: Excellent second here last start on Soft 6. Handles the track and condition well.

selections.name: Last Druid
selections.reason: In superb form with a win and a close second at Rosehill last start. The clear horse to beat.

selections.name: Spiritualistic
selections.reason: Consistent mare who won well at Nowra two starts back. Drawn to get a perfect trail.

selections.name: Killer Kerr
selections.reason: Excellent second at Goulburn last start. Handles soft tracks well and is very fit.

selections.name: Rotho Bro
selections.reason: Hit the line strongly for third at Newcastle last start. Will be charging home late.

danger_horse.name: Etched In Time
danger_horse.reason: Resumes. Has a class edge on many of these and has performed well fresh previously.

selections.name: Seven Days
selections.reason: Excellent second here first-up. Strips much fitter today and Chad Schofield rides.

selections.name: Boambee Beach
selections.reason: Speedy mare who won dominant fashion on heavy ground three starts back. Major player.

selections.name: Silk Lace
selections.reason: Consistent filly with consecutive placings on soft tracks. Sure to be competitive.

selections.name: Twinkling Star
selections.reason: First-up. Has an excellent fresh record, including a win at this track previously.

danger_horse.name: Spare
danger_horse.reason: Dominant 4.8 length winner here last start. Must be respected despite class rise.
